core_mechanism: a first-order (discontinuous) collective phase transition in an ensemble of many two-state units coupled to a single shared mode, in which the collective order parameter jumps abruptly as the coupling strength crosses a critical threshold
brief_reason: The abstract predicts a first-order super-radiant phase transition in a general class of multi-qubit-cavity systems, i.e. many two-level units coupled to one cavity mode undergoing a discontinuous collective transition.
